VO_VI: Ban khong muon nghi ve chuyen nay.

VO_EN: You pull your shirt down.
VO_VI: Ban keo ao xuong.

VO_EN: The scar is still there.
VO_VI: Vet seo van o do.

VO_EN: It didn't grow back.
VO_VI: No khong moc lai.

VO_EN: Nothing did.
VO_VI: Khong gi moc lai ca.

VO_EN: Somewhere behind you, a door opens.
VO_VI: O dau do phia sau ban, mot canh cua mo.

VO_EN: Or you think it does.
VO_VI: Hoac ban tuong vay.
